description: Real SUPERAGENT_CAPTURE_DIR capture (2026-07-09, claude-agent-sdk 0.3.206 / CLI 2.1.206). Two run_in_background Bash tasks (sleep 8, sleep 30) started in one turn. Includes the new background_tasks_changed system messages: full live-task snapshots on each membership change (1 task -> 2 tasks -> 1 -> 0). Premature session_state_changed:idle fires at turn-end while both tasks run; each task later clears via its own task_notification/task_updated. Guards: idle-with-bg-pending must emit session_waiting_background (not finalize), and snapshot-based liveness must agree with the incremental map at every frame.
